summary: Connected CodexRunner to the ExecutionBackend abstraction instead of keeping app-server orchestration entirely inline.
Expanded CodexAppServerBackend so it tracks turn completion, structured output, summaries, raw event logs, and returns runner-usable artifacts.
Kept the existing CodexRunner result shape while writing implementation_result.json and changed_files.json from backend-collected outputs.
risks: Candidate mode and turn/steer are still not wired into the outer pipeline control flow; the backend now supports the primitives but the orchestration path still uses single-writer execution.
lint and typecheck were not rerun for this scoped runtime change.
